Ediz Tiyansan

Copied

While the world is focused on the Paris Olympics, the city of Los Angeles is preparing to host the 2028 Summer Games for a third time. Ediz Tiyansan reports from Los Angeles, which last hosted the international sporting event 40 years ago.

For more, check out our exclusive content onCGTN Nowand subscribe to our weekly newsletter,The China Report.
